records.display_name: United Nations Statistics Division — M49 Overview
records.public_attribution_text: Country identity codes cross-checked against the United Nations M49 standard.
records.redistribution_boundary: Do not redistribute the acquired raw page as a Drishvara dataset.

records.public_attribution_text: Core sovereign-state scope cross-checked against United Nations member-state evidence.
Holy See and State of Palestine scope cross-checked against United Nations non-member-state evidence.
Capital names and coordinates are retained as crosscheck candidates pending explicit verification.
records.redistribution_boundary: Candidate values must not be represented as Drishvara-verified coordinates.

records.public_attribution_text: Timezone identifiers and country-zone candidates derive from the IANA Time Zone Database.
records.redistribution_boundary: Country-zone candidates do not constitute capital-level timezone approval.
Internal candidate/review input; not an authoritative public source.
